summary: 2018 DHS 'See Something, Say Something / Why I Say Something' public-service announcement: a young woman on a city bus and at a station delivers spoken testimonial lines about why she reports suspicious activity, with single-word text cues ('WHY') and a closing 'If you see something, say something' card with the DHS seal. Spoken-word testimonial PSA, not music-driven, conventional safety messaging. Out of scope: a plain informational PSA, not youth-appeal music-driven genre content.
notable_text: WHY; If you SEE something, [SAY something]; Report suspicious activity to local authorities.
